productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adipure Trainer Black Sports Shoes
description: Harness your body's natural mechanics for optimal training in the adidas adiPURE& trade Trainer shoes. The toes are liberated so your foot can move as freely as if you were barefoot, with a rounded outsole in tough rubber for extra protection and traction. adidas have re-invented the shoe to ensure that your foot is free to move naturally while looking ultra-stylish, so if you want your feet to turn heads then this is the perfect choice for you. Upper Stretch textile upper for a flexible Fit Firm heel support and lightly padded collar Individual toe stalls mimic the natural motion of the foot Synthetic panel on forefoot gives protection to toe upper Midsole OrthoLite® performance insoles giving 'comfort from the inside out' Insole wicks away moisture, inhibits odour and fungus and ensures air flow to keep your feet cool Outsole Anatomically rounded outsole with great grip for wet and slippery terrain Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
